deck:
* Weinberg Converter (V1 classic push-pull/CT-FW diode) - Generated by OpenMagnetics
* Vin=48V, Vo=12V, f=100kHz, D=57.1459 pct, n=4.667, regime=boost
* L1=237.143uH, Lpri_half=236.906uH, Lsec_half=10.8768uH, Co=95.2432uF, Iout=2A, Iin=8A

* DC Input + sense
Vin vin_dc 0 48
Vin_sense vin_dc vin_p 0

* Switch and diode models
.model SW1 SW VT=2.5 VH=0.5 RON=0.01 ROFF=1Meg
.model DIDEAL D(IS=1.000000e-12 RS=5.000000e-02)

* PWM sources (Q1 phase=0, Q2 phase=Tsw/2)
Vpwm1 pwm1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 5.714592e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm2 pwm2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 5.000000e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 5.714592e-06 1.000000e-05)

* Input coupled inductor L1 (1:1, two windings, k=0.999)
L1a vin_p l1a_dcr_mid 2.371429e-04 ic=4.000000
Rdcr_l1a l1a_dcr_mid priCT_a 0.050000
L1b vin_p l1b_dcr_mid 2.371429e-04 ic=4.000000
Rdcr_l1b l1b_dcr_mid priCT_b 0.050000
K_in L1a L1b 0.999000

* Main transformer primary (CT push-pull, opposite-dot windings)
Vpri_sense_a priCT_a pri_a_sense_mid 0
Llk_pa pri_a_sense_mid pri_a_top 2.371429e-07
Lpri_a drainQ1 pri_a_top 2.369058e-04
Vpri_sense_b priCT_b pri_b_sense_mid 0
Llk_pb pri_b_sense_mid pri_b_top 2.371429e-07
Lpri_b pri_b_top drainQ2 2.369058e-04

* Main transformer secondary (CT-FW, opposite-dot windings)
Lsec_a secCT secCT_a_mid 1.087677e-05
Llk_sa secCT_a_mid diodePos 1.088766e-08
Lsec_b secCT_b_mid secCT 1.087677e-05
Llk_sb secCT_b_mid diodeNeg 1.088766e-08
K_pa_pb Lpri_a Lpri_b 0.999900
K_pa_sa Lpri_a Lsec_a 0.999900
K_pa_sb Lpri_a Lsec_b 0.999900
K_pb_sa Lpri_b Lsec_a 0.999900
K_pb_sb Lpri_b Lsec_b 0.999900
K_sa_sb Lsec_a Lsec_b 0.999900

* Push-pull switches S1, S2 (2 SW1) + snubbers
S1 drainQ1 0 pwm1 0 SW1
S2 drainQ2 0 pwm2 0 SW1
Rsnub_s1 drainQ1 0 100.000000
Csnub_s1 drainQ1 sn_s1 1.000000e-10
Rsnub_s1b sn_s1 0 0.001
Rsnub_s2 drainQ2 0 100.000000
Csnub_s2 drainQ2 sn_s2 1.000000e-10
Rsnub_s2b sn_s2 0 0.001

* (Energy-recovery D3 omitted — see comment in Weinberg.cpp)

* Bridge / Vab probe (V_DS of S1 = 2·Vin/(1−D))
Bvab vab 0 V=V(drainQ1)-V(drainQ2)

* Secondary center-tap returns to GND
Vsec_ct_sense secCT 0 0

* CT-FW rectifier diodes D_pos, D_neg
Vsec_pos_sense diodePos sec_pos_in 0
D_pos sec_pos_in out_node DIDEAL
Vsec_neg_sense diodeNeg sec_neg_in 0
D_neg sec_neg_in out_node DIDEAL
Rsnub_dp diodePos out_node 100.000000
Csnub_dp diodePos sn_dp 1.000000e-10
Rsnub_dpb sn_dp out_node 0.001
Rsnub_dn diodeNeg out_node 100.000000
Csnub_dn diodeNeg sn_dn 1.000000e-10
Rsnub_dnb sn_dn out_node 0.001

* Output cap (with ESR) and resistive load
Cout out_node co_esr 9.524320e-05 ic=12.000000
Rco_esr co_esr 0 0.005000
Vout_sense out_node out_load 0
Rload out_load 0 6.000000

* Probes
Bvpri_diff vpri_diff 0 V=V(vab)
Bvsec_combined vsec_combined 0 V=V(secCT_a_mid)-V(secCT_b_mid)
Bisec_combined isec_combined 0 V=I(Vsec_pos_sense)-I(Vsec_neg_sense)

* Transient analysis (UIC enables .ic)
.tran 5.000000e-08 3.001000e-02 3.000000e-02 UIC

* Output signals
.save v(vpri_diff) v(vin_dc) v(vab) v(out_node) v(vsec_combined) v(isec_combined) i(Vin_sense) i(Vout_sense) i(Vpri_sense_a) i(Vpri_sense_b)

.options RELTOL=0.010000 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=500
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000
.end
